lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak kis no aakheeai aape devanahaar |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, whom can we ask? He Himself is the Great Giver. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਲਗੈ ਸਚਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aap veechaareeai lagai sach piaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh reflects on the self, lovingly attached to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਬਾਬੀਂਹਾ ਪਸੂ ਹੈ ਇਸ ਨੋ ਬੂਝਣੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu baabeenhaa pasoo hai is no boojhan naeh |
lines.english: This rainbird is an animal; it has no understanding at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਏਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਹੈ ਮਤ ਕੋ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa ehu jagat hai mat ko bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: This world is a rainbird; let no one be deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਪੀਤੈ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har kaa naam hai jit peetai tikh jaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is Ambrosial Nectar; drinking it in, thirst is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਨੑ ਪੀਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਲਾਗੀ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh jina peea tina bahurr na laagee aae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those Gurmukhs who drink it in shall never again be afflicted by thirst. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਅਪਣੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਾਂ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo apanee kripaa kare taan varatai sabh loe |
lines.english: When the Dear Lord grants His Grace, then the rain falls on all the people of the world.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰੁ ਸੀਤਲ ਰਾਗੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਐ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: malaar seetal raag hai har dhiaaeiai saant hoe |
lines.english: Malaar is a calming and soothing raga; meditating on the Lord brings peace and tranquility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੁਠੈ ਜੀਆ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਧਰਣੀ ਨੋ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vutthai jeea jugat hoe dharanee no seegaar hoe |
lines.english: From this rain, all creatures find the ways and means to live, and the earth is embellished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਲੁ ਹੈ ਜਲ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸਭ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak ihu jagat sabh jal hai jal hee te sabh koe |
lines.english: O Nanak, this world is all water; everything came from water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸਦਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ko viralaa boojhai so jan mukat sadaa hoe |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, a rare few realize the Lord; such humble beings are liberated forever. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਕੂੜਾ ਗਰਬੁ ਸਚੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਮਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: maanas koorraa garab sachee tudh manee |
lines.english: False is the pride of man. True is Your glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਦੂਜੇ ਕਿਸੁ ਗਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: too sabh kichh aape aap dooje kis ganee |
lines.english: You Yourself are everything; who else is of any account?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਇਕੋ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa veparavaahu iko too dhanee |
lines.english: O True and Independent Lord God, You alone are my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਆਇਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਗਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve aapanaa aaeaa tis ganee |
lines.english: But if the mortal serves his True Guru, his coming into the world is judged to be worthwhile.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਰਚਾਇ ਉਪਾਈ ਮੇਦਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun rachaae upaaee medanee |
lines.english: Coming and going in reincarnation, the beings and species of the world came into being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਟੇ ਪਾਪ ਅਸੰਖ ਨਾਵੈ ਇਕ ਕਣੀ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: katte paap asankh naavai ik kanee |11|
lines.english: Countless sins are erased, by even a tiny particle of the Lord's Name. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੋਹਿ ਗੁਬਾਰਿ ਜਿਉ ਭੁਲਾ ਮੰਝਿ ਵਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mohi gubaar jiau bhulaa manjh vanee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is lost in the darkness of emotional attachment, like the man lost in the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ਤ ਕੇਹੀ ਗਣਤ ਗਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: je haumai vichahu jaae ta kehee ganat ganee |
lines.english: And if he eradicates eogtism from within himself, then how can he be judged?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਖਸਮੈ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa khasamai kaa mehal na jaanahee mehal dekh aradaas paae |
lines.english: O rainbird, you do not know the Mansion of your Lord and Master's Presence. Offer your prayers to see this Mansion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapanai bhaanai bahutaa boleh boliaa thaae na paae |
lines.english: You speak as you please, but your speech is not accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਸਮੁ ਵਡਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਇਛੇ ਸੋ ਫਲ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khasam vaddaa daataar hai jo ichhe so fal paae |
lines.english: Your Lord and Master is the Great Giver; whatever you desire, you shall receive from Him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਭਿੰਨੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa bhinee rain boliaa sahaje sach subhaae |
lines.english: The night is wet with dew; the rainbird sings the True Name with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਕਿਆ ਬਪੁੜਾ ਜਗਤੈ ਕੀ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa kiaa bapurraa jagatai kee tikh jaae |1|
lines.english: Not only the thirst of the poor rainbird, but the thirst of the whole world is quenched. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਲੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਹੈ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jal meraa jeeo hai jal bin rehan na jaae |
lines.english: This water is my very soul; without water, I cannot survive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee jal paaeeai vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, this water is obtained, and egotism is eradicated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਚਸਾ ਨ ਜੀਵਦੀ ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jis bin chasaa na jeevadee so satigur deea milaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I cannot live without Him, even for a moment; the True Guru has led me to meet Him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡ ਪਤਾਲ ਅਸੰਖ ਮੈ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: khandd pataal asankh mai ganat na hoee |
lines.english: There are countless worlds and nether regions; I cannot calculate their number.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਿਰਜੀ ਤੁਧੈ ਗੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: too karataa govind tudh sirajee tudhai goee |
lines.english: You are the Creator, the Lord of the Universe; You create it, and You destroy it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh medanee tujh hee te hoee |
lines.english: The 8.4 million species of beings issued forth from You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਦਾਤੇ ਇਕ ਮੰਗਤੇ ਸਭਨਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik daate ik mangate sabhanaa sir soee |
lines.english: Some are givers, and some are beggars; God is above the heads of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਾਹ ਸਦਾਵਹਿ ਸੰਚਿ ਧਨੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik saah sadaaveh sanch dhan doojai pat khoee |
lines.english: Some claim to be bankers and accumulate wealth, but in duality they lose their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਖਾਨ ਮਲੂਕ ਕਹਹਿ ਕਹਾਵਹਿ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik raaje khaan malook kaheh kahaaveh koee |
lines.english: Some are called kings, emperors and nobles.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜ ਨਿਖੁਟੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਚੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: koorr nikhutte naanakaa sach kare su hoee |12|
lines.english: Falsehood shall not last, O Nanak; whatever the True Lord does, comes to pass. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਾਜਾਰੀਆ ਭੀਹਾਵਲਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai baajaareea bheehaaval hoee |
lines.english: Without the Name, they are vulgar, dreadful and wretched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar terai har vasai guramukh sadaa hajoor |
lines.english: Deep within your inner being, the Lord abides. The Gurmukh beholds Him ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਉਗਣਵੰਤੀ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa gunavantee mehal paaeaa aauganavantee door |
lines.english: O rainbird, the virtuous soul-bride attains the Mansion of her Lord's Presence; the unworthy, unvirtuous one is far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੈ ਘਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate sahaje mile sabad guroo kai ghaal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are imbued with the Naam intuitively merge with the Lord; they practice the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂਕ ਪੁਕਾਰ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਦਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: kook pukaar na hovee nadaree nadar nihaal |
lines.english: When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, the mortal no longer weeps and wails.
